acp_jobs.note: NameError F not defined; re-submitted as v2

tasks_completed.summary: SO(3) codebook utilities factored into shared so3_codebook.py (+6 tests)
[CLS_POSE_OBJ] token wired into DCFBranch behind enable_object_pose_head flag
DexYCBDCFDataset emits 4 GT pose fields + Umeyama-derived s_gt + <1mm load-time assertion
6 new pose losses in CausalLoss (R, t, s, cls, res, consist); stream3r.py key propagation
dcf_smoke.yaml + dcf_overfit.yaml updated to enable pose head
dcf_dataloader_train.py: 13 new CLI flags + Option B'' shape-consistency loss
infer_per_view_overfit.py: auto-detect pose head from checkpoint; save pred_rigid per frame
All 8 ACP runs trained to 2000 epochs + evaluated on train + s1_test sequences

tasks_pending.summary: Expand training manifest beyond subject-01 (subjects 0-6 for s1_test setup)
tasks_pending.detail: All current architectural findings are contaminated by single-subject overfit (5-7x generalisation gap on unseen subject-08). Build manifest covering subjects 00-06 matching dexycb s1 train split, retrain a B.00-analogue as the new baseline. Per memory/project_overfit_subject01.md.

tasks_pending.summary: Run full s1_test eval (all ~200 sequences across subjects 7+8)
tasks_pending.detail: Current test numbers use one sequence (20201002-subject-08/20201002_104620). Build s1-test manifest via dex_ycb_toolkit factory.get_dataset('s1_test'), adapt infer_per_view_overfit.py to iterate over all sequences and average metrics. D.2 vs C.00 ranking may flip.

tasks_pending.summary: Implement Option C (residual reparametrisation) for hard shape constancy
tasks_pending.detail: pred_traj = s*R*canonical + t + delta, with heavy ||delta|| penalty. Only unexplored mechanism for <0.5 mm shape drift without B.1's Procrustes catastrophe. ~50 LOC in stream3r/models/dcf_branch.py.decode_outputs.

tasks_pending.summary: Eval on s0_test + s3_test (official DexYCB splits for grasp / object generalisation)
tasks_pending.detail: Complement s1 (subject) generalisation with s3 (object) to detect object-specific overfitting. Use dex_ycb_toolkit factory for split definitions.
Current K=2048 gives ~15 deg Voronoi cells; pose rotation MAE bottoms out there. Cheap config change to drop floor below ~10 deg.
Split test obj L2 by YCB class. Hypothesis: pose head helps more for symmetric objects (cans, spheres) where traj head has ambiguity to resolve.

tasks_pending.summary: Regularise pose head specifically (dropout / weight decay / LR)
tasks_pending.detail: D.0/D.1 show pose-rigid overfits more than trajectory on test (154 vs 115 mm). Try dropout on object_pose_head.* modules or separate LR schedule.

caveats: All eval numbers are from one sequence per split; proper s1_test averaging pending.
Training data is subject-01 only — every architectural finding assumes this confounded baseline.
Pose-head rotation accuracy capped at ~15 deg by K=2048 codebook Voronoi cells; hasn't been raised.
Shape drift metric is inter-frame Procrustes residual only; per-frame rigid-fit residual not computed.
infer_per_view_overfit.py auto-detection relies on object_pose_cls_token key; future pose-head variants may need explicit flag.
v1-v2 of the publish page were wrong (training loss confused with eval metric); v3-v7 are corrected but v1/v2 were overwritten not deleted.
resume_prompt: Read the sidecar at https://haonanhe.github.io/HOI3R-project-tracking/updates/2026-04-21-session-summary-dcf-pose-head-train-test.json and continue from the first pending task.
